summary: Third iteration UI-only testing of Guest Dashboard at /dashboard. Executed 44 Playwright assertions covering sidebar navigation (all 8 sections), Upcoming Stay buttons + modals (Modify, Early Check-in, Book Spa nav, Book Dinner nav), top bar (search modal with query 'maharajah' returning 2 results, outside-click close, notifications panel with 3 items, mark-all-read, dismiss-n1), quick actions (4/4), export-history, row-invoice, Bookings section (4 rows, view/modify/cancel modals + cancel-confirm), Invoices section (4 rows, download + email), Profile save, Settings toggles (emailUpdates + twoFactor), currency/language selects, prefs-save, reset-password, and Dining/Spa/Experiences cards with action buttons. Header changes correctly between 'Welcome back, Aarav' and section labels.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx is 801 lines - consider splitting sections (Bookings, Invoices, Profile, Settings, Modals) into subcomponents for maintainability.
Modify modal date inputs use hardcoded values with no-op onChange - date pickers are non-functional (cosmetic only). Acceptable for mock UI showcase.
Early-checkin slot buttons have no selected-state or onClick handler - only the submit button triggers a toast. Consider adding slot selection state.
All actions are mocked via sonner toast - explicitly acknowledged as MOCKED per problem statement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard at /dashboard fully functional. All data-testids match spec. Toasts render via sonner (verified visually - e.g., 'Password reset email sent' toast in final screenshot). Viewport tested at 1440x900.
